docs.title: Simple Language | Simple Language
docs.text: Dynamic Expression Language for GoCamel | Langage d'Expressions Dynamiques pour GoCamel

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Simple Language is a dynamic expression language inspired by Apache Camel. It allows you to embed expression placeholders in strings, enabling dynamic routing, message transformation, and conditional processing.

docs.title: Syntax
docs.text:
Expressions are enclosed in ${}:

"Hello ${body}"                    // Body content
"Priority: ${header.priority}"     // Header value
"ID: ${exchangeProperty.id}"       // Exchange property

docs.title: Built-in Variables
docs.text: Variable Description Example ${body} Message body ${body} ${header.name} Header value ${header.Content-Type} ${exchangeProperty.name} Exchange property ${exchangeProperty.correlationId}

docs.title: Built-in Functions
docs.text: Function Description Example ${date:now} Current timestamp ${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd} ${random(max)} Random number ${random(100)} ${uuid} UUID generation ${uuid} ${env:VAR} Environment variable ${env:USER}

docs.title: Comparison Operators
docs.text:
${body == 'active'}           // Equality
${body != 'inactive'}          // Inequality
${header.count > 10}          // Greater than
${header.count >= 10}         // Greater than or equal
${header.count < 100}         // Less than
${header.count <= 100}        // Less than or equal

docs.title: Null-safe Navigation
docs.text: ${body?.field?.subfield}       // Null-safe access

docs.title: Bracket Notation
docs.text:
${body['key']}                 // Map access
${body[0]}                     // Array/slice index
${body['user']['name']}        // Nested access

docs.title: In Choice EIP
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:input").
    Choice().
        When("${header.priority == 'high'}").
            To("direct:urgent").
        When("${header.count > 100}").
            To("direct:large-batch").
        Otherwise().
            To("direct:normal").
    EndChoice()

docs.title: In Headers and Body
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    SimpleSetHeader("X-Request-ID", "${uuid}").
    SimpleSetBody("Processed at ${date:now} for user ${header.username}").
    To("direct:output")

docs.title: In Logging
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    Log("Processing order ${header.orderId} with value ${body?.total}")

docs.title: In ToD (Dynamic URI)
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    SetHeader("filename", "report.txt").
    ToD("file://output/${header.filename}")

docs.title: Null-safe Chain
docs.text:
// Safe navigation through potentially nil structures
"User name: ${body?.user?.profile?.name}"

docs.title: Combined Conditions
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    Choice().
        When("${header.type == 'A' && body.status == 'active'}").
            To("direct:processA").
        When("${header.priority > 5 || random(10) > 7}").
            To("direct:random-priority").
    EndChoice()

docs.title: Vue d'Ensemble
docs.text: Simple Language est un langage d'expressions dynamiques inspiré d'Apache Camel. Il vous permet d'insérer des placeholders d'expressions dans des chaînes, permettant le routage dynamique, la transformation de messages et le traitement conditionnel.

docs.title: Syntaxe
docs.text:
Les expressions sont entourées de ${}:

"Bonjour ${body}"                  // Contenu du body
"Priorité: ${header.priority}"     // Valeur d'en-tête
"ID: ${exchangeProperty.id}"       // Propriété d'échange

docs.title: Variables Intégrées
docs.text: Variable Description Exemple ${body} Corps du message ${body} ${header.name} Valeur d'en-tête ${header.Content-Type} ${exchangeProperty.name} Propriété d'échange ${exchangeProperty.correlationId}

docs.title: Fonctions Intégrées
docs.text: Fonction Description Exemple ${date:now} Timestamp actuel ${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd} ${random(max)} Nombre aléatoire ${random(100)} ${uuid} Génération UUID ${uuid} ${env:VAR} Variable d'environnement ${env:USER}

docs.title: Opérateurs de Comparaison
docs.text:
${body == 'active'}           // Égalité
${body != 'inactive'}          // Inégalité
${header.count > 10}          // Supérieur à
${header.count >= 10}         // Supérieur ou égal
${header.count < 100}         // Inférieur à
${header.count <= 100}        // Inférieur ou égal

docs.title: Navigation Null-safe
docs.text: ${body?.field?.subfield}       // Accès null-safe

docs.title: Notation par Crochets
docs.text:
${body['key']}                 // Accès Map
${body[0]}                     // Index tableau/tranche
${body['user']['name']}        // Accès imbriqué

docs.title: Dans Choice EIP
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:input").
    Choice().
        When("${header.priority == 'high'}").
            To("direct:urgent").
        When("${header.count > 100}").
            To("direct:large-batch").
        Otherwise().
            To("direct:normal").
    EndChoice()

docs.title: Dans Headers et Body
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    SimpleSetHeader("X-Request-ID", "${uuid}").
    SimpleSetBody("Traité à ${date:now} pour l'utilisateur ${header.username}").
    To("direct:output")

docs.title: Dans Logging
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    Log("Traitement commande ${header.orderId} avec valeur ${body?.total}")

docs.title: Dans ToD (URI Dynamique)
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    SetHeader("filename", "report.txt").
    ToD("file://output/${header.filename}")

docs.title: Chaîne Null-safe
docs.text:
// Navigation sécurisée à travers structures potentiellement nil
"Nom utilisateur: ${body?.user?.profile?.name}"

docs.title: Conditions Combinées
docs.text:
builder.From("direct:start").
    Choice().
        When("${header.type == 'A' && body.status == 'active'}").
            To("direct:processA").
        When("${header.priority > 5 || random(10) > 7}").
            To("direct:random-priority").
    EndChoice()
